sourceMovie.title: Squid Game: Making Season 2
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Squid Game: Making Season 2 (2025) stuck because it commits to its documentary premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: Obi-Wan Kenobi: A Jedi's Return
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Squid Game: Making Season 2 clicked for you, Obi-Wan Kenobi: A Jedi's Return (2022) is a strong next stop: both trade in documentary, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Squid Game: Making Season 2?
faq.answer: Try Obi-Wan Kenobi: A Jedi's Return, Hearts of Darkness: A Filmmaker's Apocalypse, Making Squid Game: The Challenge—each shares DNA with Squid Game: Making Season 2 while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Squid Game: Making Season 2?
faq.answer: Squid Game: Making Season 2 (2025) is best described as Documentary. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Squid Game: Making Season 2 worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 8.4/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this documentary lane.
